scores.correctness_notes: Covers all events from the gold standard: core lifecycle (install, start, stop, remove, config_changed, upgrade_charm, update_status), leadership (leader_elected, leader_settings_changed with deprecation note), all relation events (5 per endpoint), storage events (2 per storage), all 4 pebble events per container, all 4 secret events, both collect_*_status events, action events, series upgrade (deprecated), and collect_metrics (deprecated). Nothing missing.
